ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2021 Continued To Nov-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beverly Lavin, via ZOOM, for Steven Wong, Personal Representative.

Ms. Lavin reports that she has submitted an Inventory and Appraisal for e-filing. She is advised that it will not be filed as it requires to be filed at the window.

After additional discussion the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Nov-22-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status on Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is also set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
